author: draganrakita
content: Yeah option 3 is best here for protocol, but impl wise people prefer to stay with option 1.

author: marioevz
content: I was under the impresion we only decided option 1 for devnet-6, but perhaps if overall the option 3 is safer/best we should consider for devnet-7

author: draganrakita
content: I think people didn't want to be bothered with change as it is edge case and it is not simple for few clients. So we defaulted to option 1. If there are change of hearts i will take it 😄
